calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-04-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.

Michael A. Mooney, Esq. appeared for plaintiff Hartle Media Ventures, LLC, a Limited Liability Company.
Jeremy Paz, Director of Operations for plaintiff, was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendant Shawman Group, LLC, a Limited Liability Company, dba Fluid Bar and Lounge.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on January 23, 2009.
Doe defendants were dismissed today, May 4, 2009.

Plaintiff introduces the following documentary evidence:

Exhibit 1---Statement of Account from Hartle Media Ventures dated 05/01/09-----------ID/EVID.
Exhibit 2---Invoices from plaintiff to
defendant dated 07/13/07, 09/24/07 & 12/03/07----------------------------ID/EVID.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Hartle Media Ventures, LLC, a Limited Liability Company, and against defendant Shawman Group, LLC, a Limited Liability Company, dba Fluid Bar and Lounge as follows:

Principal - $11,400.00.
Interest - $To Be Determined.
Attorney's Fees - $1,000.00.
Costs - To Be Determined.

Counsel stipulates to the return of the Exhibits.

Counsel for plaintiff shall submit a proposed judgment to the Court for review no than May 8, 2009.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Be Relieved As Counsel
Off Calendar Apr-22-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Dave L. Neville, Esq. of the Law Offices of Dave L. Neville, Motion to Be Relieved as Counsel for Defendant Shawman Group, LLC. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Motion is denied without prejudice due to May 4, 2009 trial date. (302CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-23-2009 Set For Trial On May-04-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
